2603.24436.title: Enes Causal Discovery
2603.24436.paper_summary: Enes The proposed architecture is a mixture of experts, which allows for the model entities, such as the causal relationships, to be further parameterized. More specifically, an attempt is made to exploit a neural net as implementing neurons poses a great challenge for this dataset. To explain, a simple and fast Pearson coefficient linear model usually achieves good scores. An aggressive baseline that requires a really good model to overcome that is. Moreover, there are major limitations when it comes to causal discovery of observational data. Unlike the sachs one did not use interventions but only prior knowledge; the most prohibiting limitation is that of the data which is addressed. Thereafter, the method and the model are described and after that the results are presented.
2603.24436.paper_summary_zh: Enes 提出的架構是一種專家混合模型，這使得模型實體，例如因果關係，可以進一步參數化。<lb/>更具體地說，嘗試利用神經網絡，因為對於這個數據集，實現神經元是一個巨大的挑戰。<lb/>解釋來說，一個簡單且快速的皮爾遜係數線性模型通常能夠取得良好的分數。<lb/>一個激進的基準需要一個非常好的模型來克服這一點。<lb/>此外，在觀察數據的因果發現方面存在重大限制。<lb/>與 sachs 不同的是，這次並未使用干預，而僅僅依賴先驗知識；最具限制性的問題是所處理的數據。<lb/>之後，將描述該方法和模型，然後呈現結果。
2603.24436.author: Alexis Kafantaris et.al.
